description: Composition Blue and pink printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a border, is slightly pleated at the neck, has short puff sleeves and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This elegant kurta from vishudh is designed to flatter your silhouette and accentuate your femininity. Look stylish and ethnic in this kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
